# HEF range (green)
update img set hef_rng = 'green' where id in (
1064,1069,1098,1300,1301,1328,1329,1392,1393,1415,1416,1419,1420,1421,
1422,1435,1436,1437,1438,1512,1513,1514,1515,1526,1527,1538,1539,1550,1551,
1029,1030,1031,1032,1033,1034,1040,1041,1042,1045,1046,1047,1048,1050,1051,
1056,1057,1058,1059,1060,1061,1062,1063,1065,1066,1067,1070,1099,1104,1118,
1120,1121,1122,1123,1124,1125,1127,1129,1142,1103
);


# HEF range (gold)
update img set hef_rng = 'gold' where id in (
1218,1220,1224,1298,1299,1310,1311,1326,1327,1330,1331,1339,1340,1417,1418,1455,1456,
1457,1458,1542,1543,1544,1545,1548,1549,1035,1036,1037,1038,1095,1097,1126,1128,1130,
1131,1132,1133,1146,1147,1216,1217,1218,1219,1221,1222,1223,1225,1226,1227,1228,1229,
1230,1231,1232,1233
);


# HEF range (black)
update img set hef_rng = 'black' where id in (
1039,1052,1053,1105,1107,1135,1136,1332,1333,1365,1386,1387,1401,1433,1434,
1446,1447,1518,1519,1521,1522,1530,1531
);


# HEF range (blue)
update img set hef_rng = 'blue' where id in (
1025,1026,1054,1055,1308,1309,1334,1335,1442,1443,1536,1537,1540,1541
);


# HEF white font
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 10)) where id in (
1025,1026,1039,1052,1053,1054,1055,1105,1107,1135,1136,1308,1309,1332,1333,
1334,1335,1365,1386,1387,1401,1433,1434,1442,1443,1446,1447,1518,1519,1521,
1522,1530,1531,1536,1537,1540,1541
);


# HEF white frame
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 9)) where id in (
1334,1335,1536,1537
);


# HEF yellow frame
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 8)) where id in (
1298,1299,1300,1301,1326,1327,1328,1329,1330,1331,1339,1340,1392,1393,
1415,1416,1417,1418,1419,1420,1421,1422,1436,1437,1438,1512,1513,1514,
1515,1526,1527,1538,1539,1542,1543,1544,1545,1550,1551
);


# HEF superscript (+1)
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 7)) where id in (
1064,1069,1098,1218,1220,1224,1298,1300,1310,1420,1422,1455,1456,1457,1458,
1548,1549
);


# APF range (gold)
update img set apf_rng = 'gold' where id in (
1058,1059,1126,1128,1130,1131,1132,1133,1137,1138,1146,1147,1227,1226,1230,1231,
1232,1233,1310,1311,1320,1321,1455,1458,1459,1460,1521,1522
);


# APF range (black)
update img set apf_rng = 'black' where id in (
1030,1031,1032,1033,1034,1047,1048,1066,1067,1122,1123,1135,1136,1304,1305,1306,
1307,1316,1317,1386,1387,1390,1391,1394,1395,1425,1426,1430,1431,1448,1449,1467,
1534,1535,1552,1553,1029
);


# APF range (blue)
update img set apf_rng = 'blue' where id in (
1064,1065,1203,1218,1219,1220,1221,1222,1223,1224,1225,1298,1299,1318,
1319,1336,1341,1342,1388,1389,1415,1416,1417,1418,1432,1433,1434,1456,
1457,1515,1518,1519,1528,1529,1542,1543,1544,1545,1546,1547,1550,1551
);


# APF range (green)
update img set apf_rng = 'green' where id in (
1060,1061,1095,1097,1124,1125,1127,1129,1435,1436,1451,1452,1453,1454,
1512,1514
);


# APF range (red)
update img set apf_rng = 'red' where id in (
1035,1036,1037,1038,1052,1053,1216,1217,1228,1229,1234,1322,1323,
1324,1325,1330,1331,1332,1333,1373,1374,1437,1438,1510,1511,1548,
1549
);


# APF white font
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 5)) where id in (
1029,1030,1031,1032,1033,1034,1047,1048,1052,1053,1064,1065,1066,
1067,1122,1123,1135,1136,1203,1218,1219,1220,1221,1222,1223,1224,
1225,1298,1299,1304,1305,1306,1307,1316,1317,1318,1319,1330,1331,
1332,1333,1336,1341,1342,1373,1374,1386,1387,1390,1391,1394,1395,
1415,1416,1417,1418,1425,1426,1430,1431,1432,1433,1434,1437,1438,
1448,1449,1456,1457,1467,1518,1519,1521,1522,1528,1529,1534,1535,
1542,1543,1544,1545,1546,1547,1550,1551,1552,1553
);


# APF superscript (-1)
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 3)) where id in (
1216
);

# APF superscript (+1)
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 4)) where id in (
1220,1222,1546,1547
);


# APF may fire wire guided missiles
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 2)) where id in (
1052,1053,1064,1065,1218,1219,1220,1221,1222,1223,1224,1225
);




# Champion  (star)
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 2)) where id in (
1056,1057,1095,1097,1100,1102,1105,1107,1110,1112,1118,1120,1140,1142,1143,1145
);



# hero (rifle)
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 1)) where id in (
1045,1046,1062,1063,1213,1214
);




# commander (tank)
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | 1) where id in (
1050,1051
);


# wheel
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 4)) where id in (
1098,1099
);




# track
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 3)) where id in (
1025,1026,1035,1036,1037,1038,1039,1040,1058,1059,1060,1061,1064,1065,1069,1070,1124,1125,1126,1127,1128,1129,1130,1131,1132,1133,
1137,1138,1146,1147,1216,1217,1218,1219,1220,1221,1222,1223,1224,1225,1228,1229,1230,1231,1232,1233
);




update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 6)) where id = 1179;
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 5)) where id in
(
1226,
1227,
1234
);
update img set flag3 = (1 << 6) where id in
(
1179,
1226,
1227,
1234
);
